segments.text: He said to the disciples,
It is impossible that no occasions of stumbling should come, but woe to him through whom they come!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It would be better for him if a millstone were hung around his neck, and he were thrown into the sea, rather than that he should cause one of these little ones to stumble.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Be careful. If your brother sins against you, rebuke him. If he repents, forgive him.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If he sins against you seven times in the day, and seven times returns, saying, ‘I repent,’ you shall forgive him.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The apostles said to the Lord,
Increase our faith.
segments.speaker: The apostles

segments.text: The Lord said,
If you had faith like a grain of mustard seed, you would tell this sycamore tree, ‘Be uprooted and be planted in the sea,’ and it would obey you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But who is there among you, having a servant plowing or keeping sheep, that will say when he comes in from the field, ‘Come immediately and sit down at the table’?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Wouldn’t he rather tell him, ‘Prepare my supper, clothe yourself properly, and serve me while I eat and drink. Afterward you shall eat and drink’?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Does he thank that servant because he did the things that were commanded? I think not.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Even so you also, when you have done all the things that are commanded you, say, ‘We are unworthy servants. We have done our duty.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: As he was on his way to Jerusalem, he was passing along the borders of Samaria and Galilee.
As he entered into a certain village, ten men who were lepers met him, who stood at a distance.
They lifted up their voices, saying,
Jesus, Master, have mercy on us!
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: When he saw them, he said to them,
Go and show yourselves to the priests.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: As they went, they were cleansed.
One of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, glorifying God with a loud voice.
He fell on his face at Jesus’ feet, giving him thanks; and he was a Samaritan.
Jesus answered,
Weren’t the ten cleansed? But where are the nine?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Were there none found who returned to give glory to God, except this foreigner?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then he said to him,
Get up, and go your way. Your faith has healed you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Being asked by the Pharisees when God’s Kingdom would come, he answered them,
God’s Kingdom doesn’t come with observation;
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: neither will they say, ‘Look, here!’ or, ‘Look, there!’ for behold, God’s Kingdom is within you.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: He said to the disciples,
The days will come when you will desire to see one of the days of the Son of Man, and you will not see it.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: They will tell you, ‘Look, here!’ or ‘Look, there!’ Don’t go away or follow after them,
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: for as the lightning, when it flashes out of one part under the sky, shines to another part under the sky, so will the Son of Man be in his day.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: But first, he must suffer many things and be rejected by this generation.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: As it was in the days of Noah, even so it will also be in the days of the Son of Man.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: They ate, they drank, they married, and they were given in marriage until the day that Noah entered into the ship, and the flood came and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: Likewise, even as it was in the days of Lot: they ate, they drank, they bought, they sold, they planted, they built;
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: but in the day that Lot went out from Sodom, it rained fire and sulfur from the sky and destroyed them all.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: It will be the same way in the day that the Son of Man is revealed.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: In that day, he who will be on the housetop and his goods in the house, let him not go down to take them away. Let him who is in the field likewise not turn back.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: Remember Lot’s wife!
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: Whoever seeks to save his life loses it, but whoever loses his life preserves it.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: I tell you, in that night there will be two people in one bed. One will be taken and the other will be left.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: There will be two grinding grain together. One will be taken and the other will be left.
segments.speaker: Being

segments.text: They, answering, asked him,
Where, Lord?
segments.speaker: They, answering,

segments.text: He said to them,
Where the body is, there the vultures will also be gathered together.
segments.speaker: They, answering,
